---
title: "AI-inventarisatie"
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: cosmo
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: github
        href: https://github.com/Windesheim-A-I-Support/Inventarisatie-kleine-AI-toepassingen-binnen-het-team
lang: nl
---

```{ojs}
//| output: false
radartjes = FileAttachment("data/radartjes.csv").csv({ typed: true })
tools     = FileAttachment("data/tools.csv").csv({ typed: true })
longlist  = FileAttachment("data/tools-longlist.csv").csv({ typed: true })
```

# Radartjes {orientation="rows"}

## {.sidebar}

```{ojs}
werkprocessen = ["Alle"].concat(
  Array.from(new Set(radartjes.map(d => d.werkproces))).filter(Boolean)
)

viewof werkprocesFilter = Inputs.select(werkprocessen, {
  label: "Werkproces",
  value: "Alle"
})
```

```{ojs}
gevoeligheidOpties = Array.from(
  new Set(radartjes.map(d => d.gevoeligheid))
).filter(Boolean)

viewof gevoeligheidsFilter = Inputs.checkbox(
  gevoeligheidOpties.length > 0 ? gevoeligheidOpties : ["Laag", "Midden", "Hoog"],
  {
    label: "Gevoeligheid",
    value: gevoeligheidOpties.length > 0 ? gevoeligheidOpties : ["Laag", "Midden", "Hoog"]
  }
)
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false
gefilterd = radartjes.filter(d =>
  (werkprocesFilter === "Alle" || d.werkproces === werkprocesFilter) &&
  (gevoeligheidsFilter.length === 0 || gevoeligheidsFilter.includes(d.gevoeligheid))
)
```

---

**Toelichting**

Vult zich automatisch na elk interview. Voeg een rij toe aan `data/radartjes.csv` en push naar `main`.

## Row {height="18%"}

```{ojs}
//| content: valuebox
//| title: "Collega's gesproken"
//| icon: person-check
//| color: primary
new Set(radartjes.map(d => d.collega)).size
```

```{ojs}
//| content: valuebox
//| title: "Radartjes gevonden"
//| icon: reception-4
//| color: success
gefilterd.length
```

```{ojs}
//| content: valuebox
//| title: "Meest voorkomend"
//| icon: arrow-repeat
//| color: info
{
  if (gefilterd.length === 0) return "—"
  const counts = d3.rollups(gefilterd, v => v.length, d => d.werkproces)
    .sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])
  return counts.length > 0 ? counts[0][0] : "—"
}
```

## Row {.tabset}

### Tabel

```{ojs}
gefilterd.length > 0
  ? Inputs.table(gefilterd, {
      columns: ["datum", "collega", "werkproces", "klein_radartje", "frequentie", "gevoeligheid"],
      header: {
        datum: "Datum",
        collega: "Collega",
        werkproces: "Werkproces",
        klein_radartje: "Klein radartje",
        frequentie: "Frequentie",
        gevoeligheid: "Gevoeligheid"
      },
      sort: "datum",
      reverse: true,
      width: { klein_radartje: 300 }
    })
  : html`<p style="color:#888;padding:2rem;">Geen radartjes voor deze filters. Vul <code>data/radartjes.csv</code> na elk interview.</p>`
```

### Per werkproces

```{ojs}
{
  if (gefilterd.length === 0)
    return html`<p style="color:#888;padding:2rem;">Geen data.</p>`

  const data = d3.rollups(gefilterd, v => v.length, d => d.werkproces)
    .map(([werkproces, count]) => ({ werkproces, count }))

  return Plot.plot({
    marginLeft: 180,
    marginRight: 40,
    style: { fontSize: 13 },
    marks: [
      Plot.barX(data, {
        x: "count",
        y: "werkproces",
        fill: "#0d6efd",
        sort: { y: "x", reverse: true },
        rx: 4
      }),
      Plot.text(data, {
        x: "count",
        y: "werkproces",
        text: d => String(d.count),
        dx: 10,
        fill: "#333",
        sort: { y: "x", reverse: true }
      }),
      Plot.ruleX([0])
    ],
    x: { label: "Aantal radartjes", tickFormat: d => Number.isInteger(d) ? d : "" },
    y: { label: null }
  })
}
```

### Per gevoeligheid

```{ojs}
{
  if (gefilterd.length === 0)
    return html`<p style="color:#888;padding:2rem;">Geen data.</p>`

  const kleur = { "Laag": "#198754", "Midden": "#fd7e14", "Hoog": "#dc3545" }
  const data = d3.rollups(gefilterd, v => v.length, d => d.gevoeligheid)
    .map(([gevoeligheid, count]) => ({ gevoeligheid, count }))

  return Plot.plot({
    marginBottom: 40,
    style: { fontSize: 13 },
    marks: [
      Plot.barY(data, {
        x: "gevoeligheid",
        y: "count",
        fill: d => kleur[d.gevoeligheid] ?? "#adb5bd",
        rx: 4
      }),
      Plot.text(data, {
        x: "gevoeligheid",
        y: "count",
        text: d => String(d.count),
        dy: -10,
        fill: "#333",
        fontWeight: "bold"
      }),
      Plot.ruleY([0])
    ],
    x: { label: "Gevoeligheid" },
    y: { label: "Aantal", tickFormat: d => Number.isInteger(d) ? d : "" }
  })
}
```

# Tools {orientation="rows"}

## {.sidebar}

```{ojs}
toolTypeOpties = ["Alle"].concat(
  Array.from(new Set(longlist.map(d => d.type))).filter(Boolean).sort()
)

viewof toolTypeFilter = Inputs.select(toolTypeOpties, {
  label: "Type tool",
  value: "Alle"
})
```

```{ojs}
viewof toolTop5Filter = Inputs.checkbox(
  ["Ja", "Nee"],
  { label: "In top 5", value: ["Ja", "Nee"] }
)
```

```{ojs}
viewof toolBruikbaarheidFilter = Inputs.checkbox(
  ["Ja", "Nee", "In pilotfase"],
  { label: "Direct bruikbaar", value: ["Ja", "In pilotfase"] }
)
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false
gefilterdTools = longlist.filter(d =>
  (toolTypeFilter === "Alle" || d.type === toolTypeFilter) &&
  toolTop5Filter.includes(d.in_top5) &&
  toolBruikbaarheidFilter.includes(d.direct_bruikbaar_voor_team)
)
```

---

**Over de tools**

20 tools onderzocht op gebruikers, universitaire adoptie, academische verankering en type. Top 5 geselecteerd op die criteria.

## Row {height="14%"}

```{ojs}
//| content: valuebox
//| title: "Tools onderzocht"
//| icon: binoculars
//| color: primary
longlist.length
```

```{ojs}
//| content: valuebox
//| title: "In top 5"
//| icon: trophy
//| color: success
longlist.filter(d => d.in_top5 === "Ja").length
```

```{ojs}
//| content: valuebox
//| title: "Zichtbaar"
//| icon: funnel
//| color: info
gefilterdTools.length
```

## Row

```{ojs}
{
  if (gefilterdTools.length === 0)
    return html`<p style="color:#888;padding:2rem;">Geen tools voor deze filters.</p>`

  const bruikbaarheidKleur = { "Ja": "success", "In pilotfase": "warning", "Nee": "secondary" }
  const kostenKleur = (k = "") => k.toLowerCase().includes("gratis") ? "success" : "secondary"
  const litKleur = { "Ja": "#198754", "Nee": "#adb5bd" }

  return html`
    <div style="padding: 1rem;">
      <div class="row g-3">
        ${gefilterdTools.map(t => html`
          <div class="col-12 col-xl-6">
            <div class="card h-100 shadow-sm border-0" style="border-radius:12px; overflow:hidden;">

              <div class="card-header py-3" style="background:#f8f9fa; border-bottom:2px solid #e9ecef;">
                <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start">
                  <div>
                    <h5 class="mb-1 fw-bold">
                      <a href="https://${t.link}" target="_blank" rel="noopener"
                         style="color:inherit; text-decoration:none;">
                        ${t.toolnaam} ↗
                      </a>
                      ${t.github_link ? html`
                        <a href="https://${t.github_link}" target="_blank" rel="noopener"
                           class="ms-2 text-muted" style="font-size:0.8rem; text-decoration:none;"
                           title="GitHub">
                          &#128196; GitHub
                        </a>` : ""}
                    </h5>
                    <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-1 mt-1">
                      <span class="badge bg-light text-dark border" style="font-weight:500;">${t.type}</span>
                      ${t.in_top5 === "Ja" ? html`<span class="badge bg-warning text-dark">&#11088; Top 5</span>` : ""}
                      <span class="badge bg-${bruikbaarheidKleur[t.direct_bruikbaar_voor_team] ?? "secondary"}">${t.direct_bruikbaar_voor_team}</span>
                      <span class="badge bg-${kostenKleur(t.kosten)} bg-opacity-75">${t.kosten ?? "Onbekend"}</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="card-body" style="font-size:0.88rem;">
                <p class="mb-3 text-dark">${t.waarvoor}</p>

                <div class="mb-2">
                  <span class="fw-semibold">&#127979; Universiteiten</span>
                  <span class="ms-1 badge bg-primary bg-opacity-10 text-primary border border-primary border-opacity-25"
                        style="font-size:0.78rem;">${t.aantal_universiteiten ?? "?"}</span><br>
                  <span class="text-muted" style="font-size:0.83rem;">${t.universiteiten_voorbeeld ?? "—"}</span>
                </div>

                <div class="mb-2">
                  <span class="fw-semibold">&#128218; Gebruikt in literatuuronderzoek</span>
                  <span class="ms-1 badge" style="background:${litKleur[t.in_literatuuronderzoek] ?? "#adb5bd"}; font-size:0.78rem;">
                    ${t.in_literatuuronderzoek ?? "?"}
                  </span><br>
                  <span class="text-muted" style="font-size:0.83rem;">${t.literatuuronderzoek_toelichting ?? "—"}</span>
                </div>

                <div class="mb-0">
                  <span class="fw-semibold">&#128274; Privacy & data</span><br>
                  <span class="text-muted" style="font-size:0.83rem;">${t.data_en_privacy ?? "—"}</span>
                </div>

                ${t.reden_selectie_of_afwijzing ? html`
                  <div class="alert alert-light py-2 px-3 mt-3 mb-0"
                       style="font-size:0.82rem; border-left:3px solid ${t.in_top5 === 'Ja' ? '#198754' : '#adb5bd'};">
                    <strong>${t.in_top5 === "Ja" ? "Geselecteerd:" : "Niet geselecteerd:"}</strong> ${t.reden_selectie_of_afwijzing}
                  </div>` : ""}
              </div>

              <div class="card-footer bg-white border-top-0 pt-1 pb-3 px-3 d-flex gap-2">
                <a href="https://${t.link}" target="_blank" rel="noopener"
                   class="btn btn-sm btn-primary">Bekijk tool ↗</a>
                ${t.github_link ? html`
                  <a href="https://${t.github_link}" target="_blank" rel="noopener"
                     class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary">GitHub</a>` : ""}
              </div>

            </div>
          </div>
        `)}
      </div>
    </div>
  `
}
```
